issues.error: Type assignment incompatible — `tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.client.json` per-package failure (NOT in CI's `tsc --build` root path; CI matrix stays green). Tracked under umbrella issue #32; resolves at M2 PR-17 (dashboard SSE rewire).

import/no-restricted-paths` doesn't traverse pnpm symlinks (200+ false-positive errors on legit cross-workspace imports). Rule demoted from `error` to `warn` pending M3 work that wires `eslint-import-resolver-typescript`. Structural `eslint-boundary.test.ts` validates the rule definitions stay in place. Principle 1 `no-restricted-imports` stays at error severity and works correctly today.
